mapper.sql: conmment_id, user_id, work_id, parent_comment_id, in_comment_id, conmment_floor, conmment_text, is_delete, time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_comments (user_id, work_id, parent_comment_id, in_comment_id, conmment_floor, conmment_text, is_delete, time) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{work_id}, #{parent_comment_id}, #{in_comment_id}, #{conmment_floor}, #{conmment_text}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_comments WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY conmment_floor ASC, conmment_id DESC
SELECT FROM tb_comments WHERE conmment_id = #{commentId} AND is_delete = 0
